alerts.title: Unidentified UPI Transaction of ₹730
alerts.description: A single UPI transaction of ₹730 this month has no clear merchant name, only showing a generic alert message. This makes it impossible to verify the purpose or legitimacy of the payment.

alerts.title: Others Category Jumped from ₹0 to ₹730
alerts.description: The 'Others' category had zero spending last month but now accounts for ₹730 this month, representing a 100% spike. The entire month's spend is concentrated in a single unidentified transaction.

tips: Investigate the ₹730 UPI transaction immediately — the merchant name shows only a generic alert text, which could indicate a mislabelled, fraudulent, or accidental payment. Check your UPI app or bank statement for the actual recipient UPI ID.
Since 100% of your May 2026 spending (₹730) falls under 'Others', work on categorising this transaction correctly so future months have meaningful category breakdowns for better budgeting.
Your 3-month average spend in 'Others' is ₹243.33, but this month it is ₹730 — nearly 3x the average. If this transaction is recurring, budget at least ₹730/month for this category going forward.

Set up UPI transaction alerts with merchant name verification on your banking app. Generic or missing merchant names on transactions above ₹500 should be flagged and reviewed within 24 hours to catch potential errors or fraud early.

With only one transaction recorded this month and no data from last month, ensure all your bank accounts and UPI apps are linked to your expense tracker to get a complete and accurate picture of your actual monthly spending.
